text:
is an Evangelion unit featured in the Evangelion and Japanese Swords Exhibition collaboration event.

Profile

Designed to be a more leaner than original design, the colors are more of a darker metallic tone, with golden accents instead of yellow. The arm.patch if fully golden unlike the usual green or green and yellow. It includes a waist armor similar to samurai armor, with a polyhedral armor shape in gradation colors. https://kaiyodo.co.jp/k-blog/evangelion-evolution/b=1525/ 

The sword/naginata has a pedestal also designed by Ikuto Yamashita. https://twitter.com/ikuto_yamashita/status/1207443206960340993 

History

Development

.]]
It was based on a collaboration between khara and All Japan Swordsmiths Association, named Evangelion and Japanese Swords Exhibition that started in 2007 https://www.eva-info.jp/6489 , Okayama Prefecture. The exhibition traveled all around Japan beyond the initial event.

Amongst the swords in exhibition, one sword named 刀野薙-NATAYANAGI- was designed by Ikuto Yamashita, in collaboration https://twitter.com/ikuto_yamashita/status/371922074631020544 with the sword smith 宮入小左衛門行平. https://www.touken-world.jp/modern-sword-artisan/exemption-of-examination/miyairi-kozaemon-yukihira/ 

A 185mm figure was created based on the single illustration, modeled by Yamaguchi Katsuhisa https://myfigurecollection.net/item/819707 , as part of the EVANGELION EVOLUTION line, produced by Kaiyodo: EVANGELION EVOLUTION EV-019 Evangelion Unit-01 (NATAYANAGI Ver.), with 22 movable parts and 18 joints. The figure comes with 3 types of optional hands, a pedestal, effect parts and the sword itself. It was released on 15 December 2019 for ¥8,800 (excluding tax). https://kaiyodo.co.jp/items/revoltech/ev019/
